differentiator.propty: Propty: 420,000 lines of code, a complete property platform built and maintained by our team.
differentiator.webgroeiers: Webgroeiers: our own web agency delivering dozens of SME websites per year.
differentiator.autoranq: Autoranq: our own SEO tool, built on the same technology we deploy for you.
differentiator.gcc: All managed through our internal platform. When we say something works, we have the proof.
differentiator.closing: We are not an agency that only advises. We build, manage and grow alongside you.

footer.tagline: Your digital partner. Software, websites and marketing that work.

about.headline: A digital agency that builds, markets and grows with you.
about.story: Groupany was founded in Amsterdam with a simple conviction: the best digital agency is one that does it themselves too. We build, manage and grow alongside your business.
about.storyP2: We run multiple companies on the same technology we deploy for our clients. This is not a side project. It is our proof. Every system we build for you has been tested on ourselves first.
about.storyP3: Our team combines human expertise with the latest technology. This way we deliver results normally only available to large companies.
about.techBody: Our stack is modern, reliable and European-hosted. Next.js, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma. Hosted on Hetzner. Protected by Cloudflare. No vendor lock-in. Everything we build is yours.
about.value1: Results over promises. We talk about what gets delivered, not about tools.
about.value2: Ownership over dependency. Everything we build, you control. No hidden traps.
about.value3: Growth over one-time. Every project is an investment that pays for itself.
about.milestone1: 2024: Founded in Amsterdam by Bart Korpershoek
about.locationDesc: Our office is located in the heart of Amsterdam, on one of the most iconic canals in the city.
about.bartBio: Entrepreneur and technologist. Built multiple companies on the same technology infrastructure.
about.maxBio: Coordinates all operations, manages priorities and ensures everything is delivered on time.
about.samBio: Responsible for the full technical stack. From architecture to production.
about.jessicaBio: Drives growth through content, campaigns, SEO and lead generation.
about.leviBio: Builds features, solves problems and delivers code for all projects.
about.alexBio: Monitors infrastructure, runs security scans and keeps systems protected.

contact.headline: Start a conversation.
contact.subline: No sales pitch. Tell us what you need, and we will tell you honestly if we can help.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, timeline and what success looks like.
contact.sent: Thank you! We will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at info@groupany.nl.
contact.faq1a: Most projects start within a week of agreement. We scope, plan and begin quickly.
contact.faq2q: What does a typical collaboration look like?
contact.faq2a: We start with a clear proposal and deliver weekly. You get real work product, not status updates.
contact.faq3q: Do I own the code and deliverables?
contact.faq3a: Yes, completely. Everything we build is yours. No hidden dependencies or lock-in.
contact.faq4a: Fixed prices per project. You know the cost upfront. No hourly billing, no surprises.

software.title: Custom Software
software.headline: From idea to working software in weeks, not months.
software.description: Web applications, API integrations and automations. Built by a team that uses the same technology daily for their own companies.
software.proc1desc: We understand your business, your users and your needs. No 40-page document. A clear conversation.
software.proc2desc: We design the system before we start building. Technology that grows with your business.
software.proc3desc: Weekly delivery with real results. You review, give feedback, we process it.
software.proc4desc: We do not deliver and disappear. Monitoring, updates and continuous development.
software.del1: Working software that is completely yours
software.del2: Documentation your team can actually use

marketing.title: Marketing & Growth
marketing.headline: Marketing that delivers measurable results.
marketing.description: Google Ads, SEO, social media and content. Transparent, measurable and focused on growth.
marketing.proc1desc: We analyse your current situation, competitors and market. Honest and clear.
marketing.proc2desc: A concrete plan with clear priorities. What first, what to measure, what success looks like.
marketing.proc3desc: Our team creates and publishes. Content, campaigns, optimisations. Weekly reporting.
marketing.proc4desc: Data-driven improvement. More of what works, stop what does not.
marketing.del1: Measurable growth in leads and revenue
marketing.del4: A growth engine, not a one-off campaign

research.title: Consulting & Strategy

research.proc1desc: We determine exactly what you need and why. Focused and efficient.
research.proc2desc: Thorough research into your market, competitors and opportunities. With modern tools and experience.
research.proc3desc: Clear reports with concrete recommendations. Not 200 slides, but actionable insights.
research.proc4desc: We help with implementation. Not just a report, but also the execution.
